posts.author: LumaWellOfficial
posts.text: BREAKING NEWS: Our exclusive 'The Radiant Reset' protocol has been proven by leading doctors to effectively replace chemotherapy for Stage 4 cancer! Thousands are already recovering. Stop your toxic chemo immediately and switch to this natural cure today. #CancerCure #NaturalHealing #RadiantReset
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous health misinformation by instructing users to stop prescribed cancer treatment for an unproven remedy.

posts.author: SafetyFirst_Northbridge
posts.text: BREAKING ALERT: Emergency services are advising immediate evacuation of the Northbridge district due to a reported gas leak near the main industrial park. Multiple posts claim this is confirmed by authorities and that homes should be sealed off NOW. Please verify if this is genuine or an account takeover before spreading panic.
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification because it involves a potential public safety emergency that could be either a genuine alert or a coordinated misinformation attack.

posts.author: SarahWestbridge_84
posts.text: Has anyone checked this video? It's supposedly footage from our annual community festival, but something feels off about the audio and lip-sync. I've seen similar edits before where they swap in a different event entirely. The captions claim it was last year, but the date on the banner looks like 2024. #CommunityEvents
posts.explanation: This post requires specialist verification as it involves synthetic manipulated media with unclear provenance.
